Discovery: Strait of Hormuz closure has rerouted global tanker traffic via Cape of Good Hope, extending voyage lengths 30-40% — VLCC rates hit record $423K/day on March 3, and INSW's modern fleet of VLCCs and Suezmaxes is positioned to capture elevated rates for as long as the Hormuz crisis persists; less overbought than Frontline (+62% YTD) with stronger balance sheet.
value_picks.analyst_take: Tanker operator benefiting from Hormuz disruption with structural geopolitical tailwind
